instruction: I want Chrome to warn me whenever I visit a potentially harmful or unsafe website. Can you enable this safety feature?
config: _execute_setup(command='echo {CLIENT_PASSWORD} | sudo -S apt update -y && echo {CLIENT_PASSWORD} | sudo -S apt install jq -y', shell=True)

_execute_setup(command='mkdir -p /home/user/.config/google-chrome/Default && if [ ! -f /home/user/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences ]; then echo \'{}\' > /home/user/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences; fi && cd /home/user/.config/google-chrome/Default && jq \'. + {"safebrowsing":{"enabled":false,"enhanced":false}}\' Preferences > temp && mv temp Preferences', shell=True)
